thoughts_githubactions_618521477708.content: workflow_run trigger's workflows:[...] filter matches workflow NAME (title), not filename — a workflow named 'Test CI' won't match workflows:['CI']

facts_githubworkflowskodyyml_61852319545.content: Removed workflows:[...] from workflow_run trigger; the job-level if: condition already gates on conclusion=='failure' && event=='pull_request', making the workflow-name filter redundant and overly str
